meta.notes: Tier-2 build: wiki quotes (Lord Chamberlain, Echelon) + bonus Whisper transcripts.

quotes.text: I tire of your boorish presence. It seems I must deal with you myself.
quotes.transcript: I tire of your boorish presence. It seems I must deal with you myself.

quotes.text: Begone, rabble!
quotes.transcript: Be gone, Rebel!

quotes.text: I am losing my patience!
quotes.transcript: I am losing my patience!

quotes.text: Feel the weight of your sins.
quotes.transcript: Feel the weight of your sins.

quotes.text: You are no match for my power!
quotes.transcript: You are no match for my power!

quotes.text: The anima overflows!
quotes.transcript: The Anima overflows!

quotes.text: I have anima to spare!
quotes.transcript: I have anima to spare!

quotes.text: Worthless... servants...
quotes.transcript: Worthless servants!

quotes.text: My underlings have delivered your sinstone right into my hands!
quotes.transcript: My underlings have delivered your sinstone right into my hands!

quotes.text: No doubt by now you have heard of the anima drought plaguing our reality.
quotes.transcript: No doubt by now you have heard of the anima drought plaguing our reality.

quotes.text: Stoneboard are fanatically loyal defenders, typically. The rebels have been swayed by pretty rhetoric and lies.
quotes.transcript: Stoneboard are fanatically loyal defenders, typically. The rebels have been swayed by pretty rhetoric and lies.

quotes.text: hrrgeh country
quotes.transcript: hrrgeh country

quotes.text: Your pride undoes you.
quotes.transcript: Your pride undoes you.

quotes.text: The wards protecting your sins don't have crumbled accuser.
quotes.transcript: The wards protecting your sins don't have crumbled accuser.

quotes.text: I will use the accuser's sinstone to break her, just like the Inquisitors.
quotes.transcript: I will use the accuser's sinstone to break her, just like the Inquisitors.

quotes.text: We face this challenge with dignity and remain united behind the master. Rivendreath remains resolute.
quotes.transcript: We face this challenge with dignity and remain united behind the master. Rivendreath remains resolute.

quotes.text: Draven is one of the few remaining leaders of a failed rebellion.
quotes.transcript: Draven is one of the few remaining leaders of a failed rebellion.

quotes.text: Trust in the Master's plan.
quotes.transcript: Trust in the Master's plan.

quotes.text: How long do you think until my andolings eliminate your second inquisitor?
quotes.transcript: How long do you think until my andolings eliminate your second inquisitor?

quotes.text: I serve the master.
quotes.transcript: I serve the master.

quotes.text: I serve the master.
quotes.transcript: I serve the master.

quotes.text: Are you getting snooty with me?
quotes.transcript: Are you getting snooty with me?

quotes.text: I humbly present the Moor Walker.
quotes.transcript: I humbly present the Moor Walker.

quotes.text: You have not earned your pride.
quotes.transcript: You have not earned your pride.

quotes.text: By decree of the master, the accuser is to be imprisoned and I shall assume control of the halls of atonement.
quotes.transcript: By decree of the master, the accuser is to be imprisoned and I shall assume control of the halls of atonement.

quotes.text: Look how easily the defiant fall. Their souls have been hollowed by arrogance.
quotes.transcript: Look how easily the defiant fall. Their souls have been hollowed by arrogance.

quotes.text: The ward around your sinstone weakens, accuser.
quotes.transcript: The ward around your sinstone weakens, accuser.

quotes.text: whose every prophet came from murder.
quotes.transcript: whose every prophet came from murder.

quotes.text: The daughter you murdered in the dark of night.
quotes.transcript: The daughter you murdered in the dark of night.

quotes.text: You murdered her! Your own daughter!
quotes.transcript: You murdered her! Your own daughter!

quotes.text: The master must want me to stay here and establish control of the halls, his top priority.
quotes.transcript: The master must want me to stay here and establish control of the halls, his top priority.

quotes.text: There are those disloyal Ven-their and Stoneborn who believe the master is responsible for the anima drought. Such heresy.
quotes.transcript: There are those disloyal Ven-their and Stoneborn who believe the master is responsible for the anima drought. Such heresy.

quotes.text: Come, let us proceed on foot. I do not fancy being flung off a cliff again.
quotes.transcript: Come, let us proceed on foot. I do not fancy being flung off a cliff again.

quotes.text: And even that I will take from you, traitor.
quotes.transcript: And even that I will take from you, traitor.

quotes.text: I shall present your corpse to the master.
quotes.transcript: I shall present your corpse to the master.

quotes.text: Pitiful thing! I shall be your doom!
quotes.transcript: Pitiful thing! I shall be your doom!

quotes.text: Rebels! Just drive either over or through them! They would not dare to!
quotes.transcript: Rebels! Just drive either over or through them! They would not dare to!

quotes.text: Pitiful wretches!
quotes.transcript: Pitiful wretches!

quotes.text: You are beneath my contempt!
quotes.transcript: You are beneath my contempt!

quotes.text: to think someone of my station had to resort to such measures.
quotes.transcript: to think someone of my station had to resort to such measures.

quotes.text: In your defiance, you reveal the vast pride within you, accuser.
quotes.transcript: In your defiance, you reveal the vast pride within you, accuser.

quotes.text: You are unworthy of your title, your privilege and your power.
quotes.transcript: You are unworthy of your title, your privilege and your power.

quotes.text: Oh, accuser. You sound... scared.
quotes.transcript: Oh, accuser. You sound... scared.

quotes.text: Do try to stay on your feet, Mall Walker.
quotes.transcript: Do try to stay on your feet, Mall Walker.

quotes.text: I shall keep the accuser busy. Find and destroy those inquisitors.
quotes.transcript: I shall keep the accuser busy. Find and destroy those inquisitors.

quotes.text: I name the accuser her true name. Harriet the Crimson Shade.
quotes.transcript: I name the accuser her true name. Harriet the Crimson Shade.

quotes.text: who orchestrated the assassinations of countless innocents.
quotes.transcript: who orchestrated the assassinations of countless innocents.

quotes.text: Who killed her own...
quotes.transcript: Who killed her own...

quotes.text: Wha- Why is nothing happening?
quotes.transcript: Wha- Why is nothing happening?

quotes.text: My medallion must be able to amplify the synth stone somehow!
quotes.transcript: My medallion must be able to amplify the synth stone somehow!

quotes.text: HAHAHA! I am triumphant!
quotes.transcript: HAHAHA! I am triumphant!

quotes.text: My medallion has made manifest your own accuser! Do you recognize her?
quotes.transcript: My medallion has made manifest your own accuser! Do you recognize her?

quotes.text: Hold creatures, this is a guest, not a charge.
quotes.transcript: Hold creatures, this is a guest, not a charge.

quotes.text: Come mortal, let us away from this place.
quotes.transcript: Come mortal, let us away from this place.

quotes.text: The Mistblade graces us with her presence. And what cage did our Marwalker here let you out of?
quotes.transcript: The Mistblade graces us with her presence. And what cage did our Marwalker here let you out of?

quotes.text: Be on your guard. Draven and his lackeys may still be lurking nearby.
quotes.transcript: Be on your guard. Draven and his lackeys may still be lurking nearby.

quotes.text: Mortal, we should split up to avoid being an easier target. Try not to die.
quotes.transcript: Mortal, we should split up to avoid being an easier target. Try not to die.

quotes.text: Ah, Darkhaven. They welcome anyone here. No sense of propriety. At least up in the castle there is an order as to who is permitted.
quotes.transcript: Ah, Darkhaven. They welcome anyone here. No sense of propriety. At least up in the castle there is an order as to who is permitted.

quotes.text: Revendreth is Resolute.
quotes.transcript: Revendreth is Resolute.

quotes.text: Welcome to Revendreth.
quotes.transcript: Welcome to Revendreth.

quotes.text: Sire Denathrius looks forward to me introducing you.
quotes.transcript: Sire Denathrius looks forward to me introducing you.

quotes.text: Know your place mortal. You have few allies in this realm.
quotes.transcript: Know your place mortal. You have few allies in this realm.

quotes.text: We rebuke the lies of the accuser and her traitors!
quotes.transcript: We rebuke the lies of the accuser and her traitors!

quotes.text: Echelon, bring me another soul to harvest!
quotes.transcript: Echelon, bring me another soul to harvest!

quotes.text: AHHHHHHHHH!
quotes.transcript: AHHHHHHHHH!

quotes.text: He is your master too, traitor. Release us at once!
quotes.transcript: He is your master too, traitor. Release us at once!

quotes.text: Your generosity is as vast as your wisdom, master. Your will be done.
quotes.transcript: Your generosity is as vast as your wisdom, master. Your will be done.

quotes.text: Begging my masters pardon.
quotes.transcript: Begging my masters pardon.

quotes.text: Behold the might of the Venetian!
quotes.transcript: Behold the might of the Venetian!

quotes.text: Out of my way!
quotes.transcript: Out of my way!

quotes.text: You were never up to par.
quotes.transcript: You were never up to par.

quotes.text: A waste of my talents.
quotes.transcript: A waste of my talents.

quotes.text: What did the monster ever see in you?
quotes.transcript: What did the monster ever see in you?

quotes.text: You are embarrassing yourself. And by proxy, me.
quotes.transcript: You are embarrassing yourself. And by proxy, me.

quotes.text: Ashalon, retrieve it for me immediately.
quotes.transcript: Ashalon, retrieve it for me immediately.

quotes.text: The hour of your defeat has arrived, accuser.
quotes.transcript: The hour of your defeat has arrived, accuser.

quotes.text: Eshalon, my walker, protect me!
quotes.transcript: Eshalon, my walker, protect me!

quotes.text: I have broken through the accuser's defenses! Crush her while she is weak!
quotes.transcript: I have broken through the accuser's defenses! Crush her while she is weak!

quotes.text: You, with the ugly face, ride the carriage off in a different direction as a distraction.
quotes.transcript: You, with the ugly face, ride the carriage off in a different direction as a distraction.

quotes.text: Rumors regarding the drought woefully overstated.
quotes.transcript: Rumors regarding the drought woefully overstated.

quotes.text: Rumors regarding the drought woefully overstated.
quotes.transcript: Rumors regarding the drought woefully overstated.

quotes.text: Give no credence to the rumors of rebellion.
quotes.transcript: Give no credence to the rumors of rebellion.

quotes.text: I serve the master.
quotes.transcript: I serve the master.

quotes.text: May I help you?
quotes.transcript: May I help you?

quotes.text: Siodenathrius will hear of this disrespect.
quotes.transcript: Siodenathrius will hear of this disrespect.

quotes.text: Do you know who I am?
quotes.transcript: Do you know who I am?

quotes.text: FOR THE MASTER!
quotes.transcript: FOR THE MASTER!

quotes.text: These souls cannot possibly be redeemed. Harvest them all!
quotes.transcript: These souls cannot possibly be redeemed. Harvest them all!

quotes.text: Hunt down every soul that hides within these halls.
quotes.transcript: Hunt down every soul that hides within these halls.

quotes.text: What's in the name of the master?
quotes.transcript: What's in the name of the master?

quotes.text: Are you getting snooty with me?
quotes.transcript: Are you getting snooty with me?

quotes.text: You are late!
quotes.transcript: You are late!

quotes.text: Humph, you are the Maw Walker?
quotes.transcript: Sir, you are the mall walker.

quotes.text: Pay attention, I will not repeat myself!
quotes.transcript: Pay attention! I will not repeat myself!

quotes.text: Move out.
quotes.transcript: Move out!

quotes.text: Out of my way.
quotes.transcript: Out of my way!

quotes.text: Finally.
quotes.transcript: Finally!

quotes.text: Begone, rebel filth!
quotes.transcript: Be gone, rebel filth!

quotes.text: Blood take you!
quotes.transcript: Blood take you!

quotes.text: Slay the trespassers!
quotes.transcript: SLAVE THE TRESS PASSES!

quotes.text: Be still, mortal!
quotes.transcript: Be still, mortal!

quotes.text: Dust to dust!
quotes.transcript: Dust to dust!

quotes.text: This... cannot... be...
quotes.transcript: This cannot be...

quotes.text: Your role is to hold still and stay silent.
quotes.transcript: Your role is to hold still and stay silent.

quotes.text: Drown in blood!
quotes.transcript: Drown in blood!

quotes.text: The ground bleeds!
quotes.transcript: The ground bleeds!

quotes.text: O'Payley Minions!
quotes.transcript: O'Payley Minions!

quotes.text: You never stood a chance!
quotes.transcript: You never stood a chance!

quotes.text: Your failure is complete!
quotes.transcript: Your failure is complete!

quotes.text: I will locate the Inquisitor. You find her, Sinstone.
quotes.transcript: I will locate the Inquisitor. You find her, Sinstone.

quotes.text: I have located the Inquisitor. You had better have her sin stone.
quotes.transcript: I have located the Inquisitor. You had better have her sin stone.

quotes.text: Inquisitor Vilhelm is close. And you are slow!
quotes.transcript: Inquisitor Vilhelm is close. And you are slow!

quotes.text: Be gone, Jamu!
quotes.transcript: Be gone, Jamu!

quotes.text: I will retrieve the accuser's sin stone.
quotes.transcript: I will retrieve the accuser's sin stone.

quotes.text: Your fate is carved in stone!
quotes.transcript: Your fate is carved in stone!

quotes.text: Flash is weak!
quotes.transcript: Flash is weak!

quotes.text: Finally you are silent!
quotes.transcript: Finally you are silent!

quotes.text: Expropriate Temel as well. He knows how to best exploit synstomes.
quotes.transcript: Expropriate Temel as well. He knows how to best exploit synstomes.

quotes.text: I will reassemble the sinstone for you, Temel.
quotes.transcript: I will reassemble the sinstone for you, Temel.

quotes.text: I will locate the second Inquisitor Sinstone. Meet me back here.
quotes.transcript: I will locate the second Inquisitor Sinstone. Meet me back here.

quotes.text: I have located the next Sin Stone. Have you dealt with Inquisitor Stellia?
quotes.transcript: I have located the next Sin Stone. Have you dealt with Inquisitor Stellia?

quotes.text: Just from above!
quotes.transcript: Just from above!

quotes.text: You will be crushed!
quotes.transcript: You will be crushed!

quotes.text: DRIGS TO THE LAST!
quotes.transcript: DRIGS TO THE LAST!

quotes.text: Sin stones are the most powerful and despised weapons in Revendreth.
quotes.transcript: Sin stones are the most powerful and despised weapons in Revendreth.

quotes.text: When everyone is running from their past, the worst thing that you can do is shove their faces in it.
quotes.transcript: When everyone is running from their past, the worst thing that you can do is shove their faces in it.

quotes.text: Inquisitor Wilhelm hid the pieces of his sinstone along the path above. Find them.
quotes.transcript: Inquisitor Wilhelm hid the pieces of his sinstone along the path above. Find them.

quotes.text: I will find the Inquisitor!
quotes.transcript: I will find the Inquisitor!

quotes.text: Sir, you are the mall walker.
quotes.transcript: Sir, you are the mall walker.
